2603.19565.title: PFM-VEPAR: Prompting Foundation Models for RGB-Event Camera based Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
2603.19565.paper_summary: Event-based pedestrian attribute recognition (PAR) leverages motion cues to enhance RGB cameras in low-light and motion-blur scenarios, enabling more accurate inference of attributes like age and emotion. However, existing two-stream multimodal fusion methods introduce significant computational overhead and neglect the valuable guidance from contextual samples. To address these limitations, this paper proposes an Event Prompter. Discarding the computationally expensive auxiliary backbone, this module directly applies extremely lightweight and efficient Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) and Inverse DCT (IDCT) operations to the event data. This design extracts frequency-domain event features at a minimal computational cost, thereby effectively augmenting the RGB branch. Furthermore, an external memory bank designed to provide rich prior knowledge, combined with modern Hopfield networks, enables associative memory-augmented representation learning. This mechanism effectively mines and leverages global relational knowledge across different samples. Finally, a cross-attention mechanism fuses the RGB and event modalities, followed by feed-forward networks for attribute prediction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets fully validate the effectiveness of the proposed RGB-Event PAR framework. The source code of this paper will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenPAR
2603.19565.paper_summary_zh: 事件驅動的行人屬性識別（PAR）利用運動線索來增強RGB相機在低光照和運動模糊場景中的表現，使得對年齡和情感等屬性的推斷更加準確。<lb/>然而，現有的雙流多模態融合方法引入了顯著的計算開銷，並忽略了來自上下文樣本的寶貴指導。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，本文提出了一種事件提示器（Event Prompter）。<lb/>該模塊摒棄了計算開銷昂貴的輔助骨幹，直接對事件數據應用極其輕量且高效的離散餘弦變換（DCT）和逆DCT（IDCT）操作。<lb/>這一設計以最小的計算成本提取頻域事件特徵，從而有效增強RGB分支。<lb/>此外，設計用於提供豐富先驗知識的外部記憶庫，結合現代霍普菲爾德網絡，使得聯想記憶增強的表示學習成為可能。<lb/>這一機制有效挖掘並利用不同樣本之間的全局關聯知識。<lb/>最後，交叉注意力機制融合了RGB和事件模態，隨後通過前饋網絡進行屬性預測。<lb/>在多個基準數據集上的大量實驗充分驗證了所提出的RGB-事件PAR框架的有效性。<lb/>本文的源代碼將在https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenPAR上發布。
2603.19565.author: Minghe Xu et.al.
2603.19565.authors: Minghe Xu, Rouying Wu, ChiaWei Chu, Xiao Wang, Yu Li
